items.name: Winged Helmet
items.description: Ancient depictions of the god Mercury and of Roma (personification of the city) depict them wearing winged helmets, however in the 19th century the winged helmet became widely used to depict ancient Celtic, Germanic and Viking warriors. It was also used in romantic illustrations of legendary Norse gods and heroes. The motif, along with the Horned helmet, became a clichéd signifier of the "barbarian" Northern warrior.

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Ballista
items.description: While their capability to melee combat their opponents is only rivaled by the RedCliff Knights, the Knights of the Splintered Skies also make use of some heavy artillery. The ballista, a strong long range powerful artillery, is capable of shooting bolts at ridiculous speed and power, and destroying multiple targets at once. With its hidden ability to fire lit bolts that do constant light damage, the ballista is a powerful weapon indeed.
